headline: Is It Time To Reassess PPL (PPL) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether PPL at around US$35.91 is offering fair value or a potential mispricing, this article walks through the key signals you should know. The stock is up 2.3% year to date and 7.2% over the past year, but has recently fallen 5.0% in the last week and 9.4% over the past month, which may change how you think about its risk and reward profile. Those shorter term moves sit against a longer track record, with PPL returning 41.3% over three years and 48.2% over five years...

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on PPL, Lowers Price Target to $39
summary: Barclays  analyst Theresa Chen   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $41 to $39.

headline: PPL ‘advanced’ data center pipeline grows to 28.3 GW in Pennsylvania
summary: A PPL-Blackstone joint venture is securing gas turbines for power plants that would serve data centers, company officials said.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on PPL, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $42 to $40.
